landing.hero_subtitle: Upload your lab report — PDF, photo, or camera — and get a clear, visual breakdown of every parameter, grouped by body system, with plain-English explanations.
landing.trust_3: Works With Any Lab Report Worldwide
landing.feature_1_desc: PDF, camera capture, or image upload. Take photos of your report — perfect for everyone.
landing.feature_2_desc: See your results grouped by heart, liver, kidneys, thyroid, and more — each with clear status indicators.
landing.feature_3_desc: Upload multiple reports over time and see how your values trend — with easy-to-read charts.
landing.feature_4_desc: Works with lab reports from any country. Automatic unit conversion between conventional and SI units.

upload.title: Upload Your Lab Report
upload.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to share your report
upload.pdf_desc: Drag & drop or click to select your lab report PDF
upload.camera_desc: Use your camera to capture pages of your report
upload.image_desc: Select photos of your report from your gallery
upload.drag_drop: Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse

preanalysis.title: Help Us Personalize Your Results
preanalysis.subtitle: This information helps us provide more accurate reference ranges. All fields are optional.
preanalysis.note: Providing your age and sex helps us give more accurate context
preanalysis.skip_note: No problem! Your results will use standard reference ranges. You can always re-upload with context later for more personalized analysis.

lifestyle.title: Things to Consider — Backed by Research
lifestyle.supplements: Supplements to Discuss With Your Doctor
lifestyle.disclaimer: These suggestions are based on published research. Your doctor can personalize recommendations based on your complete health history, medications, and conditions.

compare.title: Track Your Progress
compare.no_reports: Upload at least two reports to see trends

disclaimers.footer: LabDecode is an educational health literacy tool. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
disclaimers.results_banner: This analysis helps you understand your report. Please share these results with your doctor for personalized medical guidance.
disclaimers.review_param: We recommend discussing this with a healthcare professional.
disclaimers.lifestyle_footer: These are general lifestyle considerations based on published research. Your doctor can personalize these based on your complete health history.
disclaimers.trends: Trends shown are for informational tracking only. Changes in lab values should be interpreted by your doctor in the context of your overall health.
disclaimers.critical_value: This value is significantly outside the typical reference range. We recommend discussing this with a healthcare professional at your earliest convenience.

errors.analysis_failed: We're having trouble analyzing your report right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.no_api_key: The server is missing its API key configuration. Please contact the administrator.
errors.rate_limit: Please wait a moment before analyzing another report.
errors.file_too_large: This file is too large. Please try a smaller file or fewer pages.
errors.unsupported_format: This file format isn't supported. Please use PDF, JPG, PNG, or HEIC.
errors.camera_denied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
errors.unreadable: We couldn't read some values clearly. Please verify them against your physical report.
